message:
feat(daemon): add background embedding worker module

Introduces src/daemon/worker.rs — a standalone background embedding worker
that processes embedding jobs submitted to the daemon via Unix socket.

Key design points:
- EmbeddingJobConfig struct encapsulates all job parameters (db path, index
  path, two-tier mode, model selection for fast/quality tiers)
- EmbeddingWorker manages a pool of jobs via tokio mpsc channels with
  cooperative cancellation through AtomicBool flags
- Progress tracking via EmbeddingProgress with percentage, processed/total
  counts, and elapsed time
- Graceful shutdown: the worker drains in-flight jobs on cancellation signal
  rather than aborting mid-embedding
- 512 lines of self-contained async worker logic, ready for integration
  with the daemon socket handler added in 788f602

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
